commands_run: head -n 3 data/canonical/projects.jsonl && head -n 2 data/identity-review/records.jsonl && head -n 2 data/identity-review/clusters.jsonl

jq -r '.aliases.project | keys[]' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | sort > /tmp/mta_project_aliases.txt; jq -r '.aliases.project | to_entries[] | .value' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | sort -u > /tmp/mta_project_targets.txt; wc -l /tmp/mta_project_aliases.txt /tmp/mta_project_targets.txt
jq -r 'select(.record_id as $id | [...selected ids...] | index($id)) | {id, display, aliases, source_ids, payload, ev}' data/canonical/projects.jsonl
for id in ...; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '.aliases.project[$id] // empty' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done

jq -r --argjson pairs ... '.pairs.project // [] | .[] as $blocked | $pairs[] as $p | select(($blocked.record_ids | index($p[0])) and ($blocked.record_ids | index($p[1]))) | $p | @json' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
commands_not_run: No provider-backed commands or agent harness commands were run.
No canonicalize, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, or --profile/provider commands were run.
No materialize, export-jsonl, or full validate commands were run.
